steps.title: Identify the key contrast
steps.content: The notes establish the defining difference between the traditions: Venetian portolan charts were sparse in illustrations, while Majorcan ones were richly illustrated.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D directly states this distinction—Majorcan charts are richly illustrated, unlike their sparser Venetian counterparts.

The other choices either reverse the facts, fail to explain the difference, or wrongly attribute a general feature to only the Venetian tradition.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
